ocr.text: The analysis of the existing model shows that there are 258 villages (39.9%) within ≤5 km, 523 villages (80.8%) within ≤10
km, and 636 villages (98.3%) within ≤15 km, with a population of 453,984 (56.0%) within ≤5 km, 710,373 (87.5%) within ≤10
km, and 802,052 (98.8%) within ≤15 km, yielding a maximum distance of 18.3 km and a mean distance of 6.5 km. The p-
median model has 276 villages (42.7%) within ≤5 km, 552 villages (85.3%) within ≤10 km, and 642 villages (99.2%) within
≤15 km, accounting for a population of 472,262 (58.2%) within ≤5 km, 731,384 (90.1%) within ≤10 km, and 807,080 (99.5%)
within ≤15 km, with a maximum distance of 18.3 km and a mean distance of 6.0 km.
